languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest alters the pitch of his hovering torso in an attempt to mimic a bow.{/n} "Rogue Trader, your halls are filled with sacred metal and the ship's Tech-Priests must be commended in observing the sacraments of augmentation, that blessed union of flesh and Ferrum Sanctum. Beholding this charges my galvanic coils with exaltation. I, Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, greet you and thank you for the opportunity to grace these ancient mechanisms with the gift of operation."

languages.text: {n}Техножрец меняет угол парения своего туловища — попытка изобразить поклон.{/n} "Вольный Торговец, ваши чертоги полнятся священным металлом, а техножрецы достойно блюдут таинства аугментации, благословенного союза плоти и феррум санктум. Созерцание сего наполняет мои гальванические витки благостью. Я, {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетор{/g} экстремис, Эоганн Фебрус, приветствую вас и благодарю за возможность почтить даром эксплуатации эти древние механизмы".

traits.locale_text: {n}Техножрец меняет угол парения своего туловища — попытка изобразить поклон.{/n} "Вольный Торговец, ваши чертоги полнятся священным хромом, а техносоратники достойно блюдут таинства аугментации, благословенного союза плоти и феррум санктум. Созерцание сего наполняет мои гальванические витки благостью. Я, {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетор{/g} экстремис, Эо-ганн Фебрус, приветствую вас и благодарю за возможность почтить даром эксплуатации эти древние механизмы".
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

{n}The Tech-Priest alters the pitch of his torso's hovering in an attempt to mimic a bow.{/n} "Rogue Trader, your halls are filled with sacred chrome, and the ship's tech-comrades commendably observe the sacraments of augmentation, that blessed union of flesh and ferrum sanctum. languages.text: {n}テクプリストは胴体の浮遊の高さを変え、礼拝の姿勢を真似ている.{/n}「ローグトレーダー、貴殿の館は聖なるクロムで満たされ、この船のテク・コンパニオンは増幅の聖典を称賛すべきです。肉と聖なる鉄の祝福された結合です。この光景は私の電気回路に善意を注ぎます。私は、ジェネター・エクストレミス・エオガン・フェブルスと名乗り、貴殿に挨拶し、この古き機械に動作の贈り物を与える機会に感謝いたします」
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest alters the pitch of his torso's hovering in an attempt to mimic a bow.{/n} "Rogue Trader, your halls are filled with sacred chrome, and the ship's tech-comrades commendably observe the sacraments of augmentation, that blessed union of flesh and Ferrum Sanctum. Beholding this fills my galvanic coils with goodness. I, Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, greet you and thank you for the opportunity to grace these ancient mechanisms with the gift of operation."

languages.text: {n}Der Techpriester passt die Neigung seines schwebenden Torsos an, um eine Verbeugung anzudeuten.{/n} "{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, Eure Hallen sind gefüllt mit heiligem Metall und die Techpriester des Schiffs überwachen gewiss die Sakramente der Augmentation, die gesegnete Union von Fleisch und Ferrum sanctum. Dieser Anblick erfüllt meine galvanischen Spulen mit Begeisterung. Ich, {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis Eogunn Februs, grüße und danke Euch für die Gelegenheit, diese alten Mechanismen mit der Gabe des Funktionierens zu beseelen."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest alters the pitch of his hovering torso in an attempt to mimic a bow.{/n} "Rogue Trader, your halls are filled with sacred metal and the ship's Tech-Priests must be commended in observing the sacraments of augmentation, that blessed union of flesh and Ferrum Sanctum. Beholding this charges my galvanic coils with exaltation. I, {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis Eogunn Februs, greet you and thank you for the opportunity to grace these ancient mechanisms with the gift of operation."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Techpriester passt die Neigung seines schwebenden Torsos an, um eine Verbeugung anzudeuten.{/n} "{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, Eure Hallen sind gefüllt mit heiligem Metall und die Techpriester des Schiffs überwachen gewiss die Sakramente der Augmentation, die gesegnete Union von Fleisch und Ferrum sanctum. Dieser Anblick erfüllt meine galvanischen Spulen mit Begeisterung. Ich, {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis Eogunn Februs, grüße und danke Euch für die Gelegenheit, diese alten Mechanismen mit der Gabe des Funktionierens zu beseelen."

languages.text: {n}El tecnosacerdote varía el ángulo de inclinación de su torso flotante en un remedo de reverencia.{/n} «Comerciante Independiente, sus estancias están repletas del sagrado metal, y los tecnosacerdotes de su nave observan de un modo encomiable los sacramentos del aumento, la unión bendita de la carne y el ferrum sanctum. Contemplarlo carga de exaltación mis bobinas galvánicas. Yo, el {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} extremis Eogunn Februs, le saludo y agradezco que me brinde la oportunidad de honrar estos antiguos mecanismos con el don de la operatividad».
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest alters the pitch of his hovering torso in an attempt to mimic a bow.{/n} "Rogue Trader, your halls are filled with sacred metal and the ship's Tech-Priests must be commended in observing the sacraments of augmentation, that blessed union of flesh and Ferrum Sanctum. Beholding this charges my galvanic coils with exaltation. I, {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis Eogunn Februs, greet you and thank you for the opportunity to grace these ancient mechanisms with the gift of operation."

traits.locale_text: {n}El tecnosacerdote varía el ángulo de inclinación de su torso flotante en un remedo de reverencia.{/n} «Comerciante Independiente, sus estancias están repletas del sagrado metal, y los tecnosacerdotes de su nave observan de un modo encomiable los sacramentos del aumento, la unión bendita de la carne y el ferrum sanctum. Contemplarlo carga de exaltación mis bobinas galvánicas. Yo, el {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} extremis Eogunn Februs, le saludo y agradezco que me brinde la oportunidad de honrar estos antiguos mecanismos con el don de la operatividad».

languages.text: {n}Tekno Rahip, eğilme hareketini taklit etmek üzere gövdesinin süzülme açısını değiştiriyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir, salonlarınız kutsal metalle dolu. Geminin Tekno Rahipleri, et ve Demir Kutak'ın mübarek birliği olan ogmentasyon ayinlerini takdire şayan bir şekilde gerçekleştiriyor. Buna şahit olmak, galvaniz bobinlerimi sevinçle dolduruyor. {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetör{/g} Extremis Eogunn Februs olarak sizi selamlıyor ve bu kadim mekanizmaları işleyiş armağanıyla onurlandırma fırsatı verdiğiniz için teşekkürlerimi sunuyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest alters the pitch of his hovering torso in an attempt to mimic a bow.{/n} "Rogue Trader, your halls are filled with sacred metal and the ship's Tech-Priests must be commended in observing the sacraments of augmentation, that blessed union of flesh and Ferrum Sanctum. Beholding this charges my galvanic coils with exaltation. I, {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis Eogunn Februs, greet you and thank you for the opportunity to grace these ancient mechanisms with the gift of operation."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tekno Rahip, eğilme hareketini taklit etmek üzere gövdesinin süzülme açısını değiştiriyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir, salonlarınız kutsal metalle dolu. Geminin Tekno Rahipleri, et ve Demir Kutak'ın mübarek birliği olan ogmentasyon ayinlerini takdire şayan bir şekilde gerçekleştiriyor. Buna şahit olmak, galvaniz bobinlerimi sevinçle dolduruyor. {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetör{/g} Extremis Eogunn Februs olarak sizi selamlıyor ve bu kadim mekanizmaları işleyiş armağanıyla onurlandırma fırsatı verdiğiniz için teşekkürlerimi sunuyorum."

languages.text: {n}Le technoprêtre altère l'inclinaison de son torse flottant dans les airs pour tenter un semblant de révérence.{/n} « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, vos salles sont remplies de métal sacré, et les technoprêtres du vaisseau observent avec soin les sacrements de l'augmentation, union bénie entre la chair et le Ferrum Sanctum. Ce simple constat remplit mes bobines galvaniques d'exaltation. Moi, {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis Eogunn Februs, je vous salue et vous remercie de me donner l'occasion d'honorer ces mécanismes anciens du don d'opération. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest alters the pitch of his hovering torso in an attempt to mimic a bow.{/n} "Rogue Trader, your halls are filled with sacred metal and the ship's Tech-Priests must be commended in observing the sacraments of augmentation, that blessed union of flesh and Ferrum Sanctum. Beholding this charges my galvanic coils with exaltation. I, {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis Eogunn Februs, greet you and thank you for the opportunity to grace these ancient mechanisms with the gift of operation."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le technoprêtre altère l'inclinaison de son torse flottant dans les airs pour tenter un semblant de révérence.{/n} « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, vos salles sont remplies de métal sacré, et les technoprêtres du vaisseau observent avec soin les sacrements de l'augmentation, union bénie entre la chair et le Ferrum Sanctum. Ce simple constat remplit mes bobines galvaniques d'exaltation. Moi, {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis Eogunn Februs, je vous salue et vous remercie de me donner l'occasion d'honorer ces mécanismes anciens du don d'opération. »

languages.text: {n}技术神甫调整躯干悬浮的角度，试图模仿鞠躬的姿势。{/n}“行商浪人，您的殿堂充盈着神圣的金属，舰上的技术神甫恪守植入物圣礼，达致血肉与钢铁圣所的神圣结合，这着实值得称道。见此景象，我的电流线圈振奋不已。我，特级{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}伊奥贡·费布鲁斯，向您致敬，并感谢您赐予我机会，令这些古老机械得以重新运转。”

Beholding this charges my galvanic coils with exaltation. I, {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis Eogunn Februs, greet you and thank you for the opportunity to grace these ancient mechanisms with the gift of operation."
